query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "your unembedding matrix is secretly a feature lens for text embeddings" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on efficient linear attention mechanisms for visual Transformers (computer vision), whereas the user's question concerns the linguistic interpretation of unembedding matrices in text-based LLMs. This constitutes an off-domain rejection as the paper addresses a distinct construct (visual attention efficiency) sharing only the broad keyword "Transformer" without any measurable connection to the specific mechanism, domain, or variables of text embedding feature lenses.
